title: rubus schlechtendalii subsp. macrophylloides
intro: Rubus schlechtendalii subsp. macrophylloides, a lesser-known subspecies of the Rubus schlechtendalii plant, is a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and wounds due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus schlechtendalii subsp. macrophylloides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
